productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Blue Sweater
description: Composition Blue V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has full raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed neckline, stone embellishment branding on left chest and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron This sweater from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a monochrome shirt and closed toe pumps. Wear a muted scarf to complete your look.
